company.name: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.
company.subtitle: World's largest generics maker; Israeli-domiciled NYSE TEVA + TASE; founded 1901. FY24 revenue ~$16.5B (+6%); turnaround under CEO Richard Francis ('Pivot to Growth'). Innovative branded growth: Austedo (deutetrabenazine VMAT2 TD/Huntington ~$1.7B +30%) + Ajovy (fremanezumab CGRP migraine ~$470M) + Uzedy (risperidone LAI schizophrenia ~$90M ramping); Copaxone post-LOE residual ~$500M. Generics + biosimilars segments: US generics ~$3.7B, EU generics ~$4.7B, International Markets ~$2B. Heavy net debt ~$16.5B post-Allergan generics acquisition 2016

assets.name: Austedo / Austedo XR (deutetrabenazine) - selective VMAT2 inhibitor (deuterium-stabilized; Teva-discovered)
assets.stage: Commercial (TD FDA 2017 + Huntington's chorea 2017; XR once-daily 2023; growing $1.7B+)

indications.name: Tardive dyskinesia (drug-induced involuntary movements; chronic VMAT2 therapy)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Austedo ~40% US TD share growing (vs Ingrezza NBIX); chronic Rx ~18% of total TD diagnosed treated

assets.name: Ajovy (fremanezumab-vfrm) - anti-CGRP humanized IgG2 mAb (Teva-discovered ex-Labrys 2014)
assets.stage: Commercial (chronic + episodic migraine FDA Sep 2018; q1mo or q3mo dosing)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Ajovy ~22% US anti-CGRP class share (vs Aimovig AMGN/NVS, Emgality LLY, Vyepti HLUN_B); chronic prophylactic Rx
company_slice_sources.us.priceK: Ajovy WAC ~$14K/yr; PBM rebated to ~$8-10K net

assets.name: Uzedy (risperidone) - long-acting subQ injectable risperidone (MedinCell partnership; BEPO platform monthly+bi-monthly)
assets.stage: Commercial (schizophrenia FDA Apr 2023; ramping; first US risperidone monthly LAI)

indications.name: Schizophrenia (long-acting subQ; alternative to LAI Risperdal Consta + Invega Sustenna)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Uzedy US-only schizophrenia LAI niche; ~1% US schizo treated post-launch ramping rapidly

assets.name: Copaxone (glatiramer acetate) - mixture of synthetic peptides (Teva discovery; legacy MS franchise)
assets.stage: Commercial (RRMS FDA 1996; LOE 2014 generic entry; residual brand ~$500M)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Copaxone post-LOE residual brand share ~5-7% MS DMT class

assets.name: Teva US generics franchise - portfolio of ~600 generic SKUs (oral + sterile injectables + complex generics)
assets.stage: Commercial (FY24 ~$3.7B US generics; complex Gx + first-to-file launches)

assets.name: Teva EU + UK generics franchise - portfolio across Germany + UK + Italy + Netherlands + Spain etc
assets.stage: Commercial (FY24 ~$4.7B EU generics; Teva is #1-2 EU generics player)

assets.name: Teva International Markets - emerging markets (Russia + Latin America + MENA + Asia-Pacific) generics
Teva biosimilars portfolio - Truxima (rituximab) + Herzuma (trastuzumab) + Stadalbo (pegfilgrastim) + others (Celltrion + Alvotech partnerships)
assets.stage: Commercial (mAb biosimilar oncology + supportive care; ~$0.5B aggregate)

catalysts.title: Austedo XR market share + Ingrezza (NBIX) competitive dynamics + Huntington's chorea label depth
Uzedy schizophrenia LAI uptake + olanzapine LAI Ph3 readout (TV-44749 next-gen)
